settings.title: Do you have instructional videos for the Bentley Trike?
settings.content:
Yes! We now have a dedicated page for all Bentley Trike instructional videos, including setup guides, safety tips, and feature walkthroughs.

You can view them anytime here: Bentley Trike Instructional Videos.

settings.title: Is your website secure?
settings.content: Yes! Shopping at BentleyTrike.com is safe and secure. We use SSL encryption to protect your personal and payment information. Every credit card transaction is verified to ensure security.

settings.title: What payment methods do you accept?
settings.content: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, Apple Pay and more.

settings.title: Will I receive an order confirmation?
settings.content: Yes! You will receive an email confirmation within 10 minutes of placing your order. If you don’t see it, check your junk/spam folder or contact us for assistance.

settings.title: Where do you ship?
settings.content: We ship across North America, including Canada and the Contiguous United States (excluding Hawaii and Alaska). Additional shipping fees may apply to remote locations.

settings.title: When will my order ship?
settings.content: Orders are typically shipped within 2-5 business days after payment confirmation. If an item is out of stock, we will notify you with the option for a refund or backorder placement.

settings.title: How will my order be shipped?
settings.content: We partner with trusted carriers such as FedEx and UPS. Once your order ships, you’ll receive a tracking number via email to monitor your shipment.

settings.title: What if my package is delayed?
settings.content: Delivery times vary based on location. Most orders arrive within 7-10 business days. Weather delays and carrier issues are beyond our control.

settings.title: What is your return policy?
settings.content:
We accept returns within 15 days of delivery. Conditions vary based on the item’s condition:

Unopened items – Full refund (minus return shipping).

Opened items – 15% restocking fee + return shipping.

Damaged products – Eligible for a full refund or replacement (please provide documentation of damage).

settings.title: How do I return a product?
settings.content: Contact us at sales@bentleytrike.com before returning an item. Do not ship back items without prior authorization.

settings.title: How can I track my order?
settings.content: Once your order ships, you will receive an email with your tracking number. You can use this number to track your shipment through the carrier’s website.

settings.title: Frequently Asked Questions
settings.content: At BentleyTrike.com, we are committed to providing the highest level of customer service and ensuring a secure shopping experience. Below are answers to common questions. If you need further assistance, feel free to contact us at sales@bentleytrike.com.
settings.support_hours: Our customer support is available Monday to Friday: 8am-5:00 pm.
